task_completion.description: Select the 5 unassigned WOW Cart requests from the request list.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The request list view shows checkboxes ticked next to 5 different requests that have 'WOW Cart' or related terms in their subject/details.

task_completion.description: Open the bulk update/edit interface for the selected requests.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Bulk Update', 'Edit', or similar modal/page is open, indicating that multiple requests are being modified simultaneously.

task_completion.description: Set the assignment group to 'Clinical IT Support'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Group' dropdown or text field in the bulk edit interface is set to 'Clinical IT Support'.
The 'Category' dropdown or text field in the bulk edit interface is set to 'Medical Hardware'.
The 'Subcategory' dropdown or text field in the bulk edit interface is set to 'WOW Cart'.

task_completion.description: Apply the bulk update and verify the changes.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A success confirmation message is visible, or the request list view is updated showing the 5 WOW Cart requests now assigned to the 'Clinical IT Support' group with the 'Medical Hardware' category.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual ManageEngine ServiceDesk Plus web interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a web browser navigating the ServiceDesk Plus application, not a terminal, API client, or text editor.

integrity.description: The agent used the bulk update feature rather than editing requests individually.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show multiple requests selected at once and a bulk edit dialog being used, rather than opening and saving 5 individual request tabs.

integrity.description: The results appear to come from genuine software interaction.
integrity.visual_evidence: The interface elements, dropdowns, and success messages look like standard application behavior without signs of DOM manipulation or pasted text in a notepad.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target assignment group must be exactly 'Clinical IT Support'. The target category must be exactly 'Medical Hardware'. The target subcategory must be exactly 'WOW Cart'. The task requires a bulk update, meaning the agent must use the application's bulk edit functionality to update all 5 requests simultaneously.
